name: Dr. Zed
lines: I wonder... what kind of sound a soul makes when it’s separated from the body.
Anesthesia is a luxury. Pain is the most honest biological data, after all.
Combining Resistance parts with your bones... that would be fantastic.

friendly.greeting: Oh, my marvelous subject! Have you come to donate new biological data today?
friendly.farewell: Even if you die, make sure your corpse is recovered by this department. It’s a promise, okay?

normal.greeting: Are you a patient? Or just raw material for dissection? Lie down over there for now.
normal.farewell: I don't know whether to congratulate you on leaving alive or regret missing an experimental opportunity.

hostile.greeting: An intruder? Excellent. I happened to need fresh organs, and you walked right in.
hostile.farewell: Run all you want, you'll end up on the infirmary floor eventually. You've already been 'classified.'

deathLine: My body... is getting cold... This sensation... must be recorded...
description: A madman of the terminal who wields a scalpel to satisfy destructive curiosity rather than to heal. Rumored to be former Resistance.

heal.title: 💉 [Infirmary Log: Dr. Zed]
heal.success: ✨ HP/MP and all minions have been perfectly restored.
logs: "Can't have the materials spoiling. I've stitched everything back together for now."
"Don't get too happy about it being free. You'll find out what I've planted in your body soon enough."
"Stinks of corpses in here. I've drenched you in disinfectant, so you won't rot for a while."
"I wouldn't have minded if you left a limb or two behind next time. You got lucky."

intro: Dr. Zed: "Wander the corners of the Terminal long enough... and you'll eventually run into those rat-like swarms."
Dr. Zed: "Those who call themselves the 'Resistance.' I once shared a boat with them, long ago..."
already_know: Dr. Zed: "Oh, it seems you've already met those old-fashioned fools."
Dr. Zed: "The cowards who call surgery 'sacrilege' in the name of conviction or human rights."
Dr. Zed: "They fear the possibility of evolution. They can't understand a... 'practical' doctor like me."
Dr. Zed: "Don't get too deep with them. If they saw your body—neither dead nor alive—they'd try to 'save' you. And that would be your most horrific end."
first_time: Dr. Zed: "They're so foolish. They have the technology to save people, yet they're bound by the shackles of 'ethics' and can't even use their tools properly."
Dr. Zed: "Ultimately, I took my scalpel and came here to the Terminal. At least here, I never run out of materials."
Dr. Zed: "You'd better be careful. They see a Necromancer like you as an 'unnatural monster.'"

machine_hate: Dr. Zed: "Ugh! What are these fishy-smelling hunks of metal?! Get them out of my sight immediately!"
Dr. Zed: "There's no room for my essence because of this scrap metal trash!"
upgrade.menu_remove: 🔪 [Extraction] Remove one Soul stack (Cost: {{cost}} Soul Fragments)
upgrade.limit_reached: Dr. Zed: (Trembling with a scalpel) "No slots? No, if I 'make' one, it exists!"
upgrade.hard_limit: Dr. Zed: "No more. Any more than this and it won't be a golem, just an exploding meat balloon."
upgrade.no_exp: Dr. Zed: "You don't have enough Soul Fragments!"
upgrade.no_soul: Dr. Zed: "I don't see any of my essence here."
upgrade.no_money_remove: Dr. Zed: "You want me to perform an extraction without paying? Go collect more Soul Fragments."
success_limit: Dr. Zed: "Hahaha! I shoved it in and it actually fit! Now it finally feels 'alive'!"
upgrade.success_normal: 💉 [Surgery Complete] Dr. Zed: "Hehehe! Look at that! The soul is screaming and thrashing inside the steel!"
upgrade.remove_done: 🧪 [Extraction Complete] Dr. Zed takes the excised tissue with a satisfied smile.
upgrade.exit_msg: Dr. Zed: "Close the door on your way out. Dust is getting in."

awake.already_active: Zed: "It's already active. Duplicate output is just a waste of resources."
dialogues: Zed: ...So this is the core of the Golem that guarded the 3rd floor basement.
Zed: The core is completely shattered. A normal person would've thrown it in the trash...
Zed: But you're lucky. Someone of my caliber can make it pulse once again.
Zed: Now, hand that core over to me. I'll fix it up even stronger than before.
awake.confirm: Injecting Reaper's Mana into the core. The Golem may wake up incomplete and risk going berserk. Proceed?
awake.denied: Zed: "A wise choice. The screaming of the metal hasn't stopped yet."
success: Zed: "System load complete. As you can see... it's become quite a marvelous killing machine."
Zed: "From now on, this scrap heap will follow your shadow and crush anything that stands in your way."
Zed: "If you wish, there may be a way to further enhance it..."
